items.title: Thousands of 'lost Canadians' have applied for dual citizenship - is Canada ready?
items.dek: Changes to Canadian citizenship rules have led to thousands of new applications - many coming from the US.
items.body: Changes to Canadian citizenship rules have led to thousands of new applications - many coming from the US.

items.title: Love, lies, angry ghosts: Indians are bingeing on two-minute dramas
items.dek: Some of India's biggest producers are eyeing investments in micro-dramas, which are now hugely popular.
